channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Auth Done (April 2026)
item.description: Master OAuth 2.0 & OpenID Connect in our April 2026 update

item.title: AI Talks
item.description: Explore the future of AI with Generative AI & Large Language Models.

item.title: Tap to Impress
item.description: Elevate your mobile app with expert UI/UX tips and best practices.

item.title: Scale with TypeScript
item.description: Learn how TypeScript boosts large-scale app development with scalability and maintainability.

item.title: LLM Hacks
item.description: Unlock LLM potential with expert prompt engineering hacks and techniques.

item.title: Scale Smarter
item.description: Boost performance with database replication & sharding strategies.

item.title: Boost App Speed
item.description: Optimize app speed with APM tools & expert tips.

item.title: API Gateway Mastery
item.description: Master API Gateway patterns & boost API performance with expert tips and best practices.

item.title: PHP Evolved
item.description: Unlock modern PHP development with expert insights and best practices.

item.title: DB Masters
item.description: Expert DB management tools & insights at DB Masters.

item.title: Cloud Smart
item.description: Streamline cloud migration with expert strategies & best practices.

item.title: Code Your Brand
item.description: Boost your career with personal branding tips for developers. Learn to 'Code Your Brand' and stand out in the industry.

item.title: DDoS Defense
item.description: Learn effective DDoS protection strategies to safeguard your website from cyber threats.

item.title: BI Essentials
item.description: Unlock data insights with top Business Intelligence tools & strategies.

item.title: CI/CD On-The-Go
item.description: Streamline mobile app development with CI/CD automation on-the-go.

item.title: Web Components Simplified
item.description: Discover the power of Web Components and Custom Elements in our simplified guide. Unlock reusable, modular web design with ease and efficiency!

item.title: Secure Containers
item.description: Discover essential best practices for container security in our latest blog post. Protect your applications and data with expert tips for secure containers!

item.title: Automate Code
item.description: Streamline coding with automation. Learn how to boost productivity and efficiency in your dev workflow.

item.title: BDD Simplified
item.description: Learn BDD basics & simplify your testing process with our easy guide to Behavior-Driven Development.

item.title: Boost Speed: Redis vs Memcached
item.description: Discover the best caching strategies with our in-depth comparison of Redis vs Memcached. Boost your application speed and performance today!
